issues.title: Azure Vector Store is not correctly Initilazied
issues.body: I am using Azure Vector Store with the following settings in my application.yaml ```yaml spring: ai: vectorstore: azure: initialize-schema: true index-name: spring-ai-document-index ``` Loading data into the vector store works just fine, however querying the vector store produces an exception ``` java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "java.util.List.size()" because "floats" is null at org.springframework.ai.model.EmbeddingUtils.toPrimitive(EmbeddingUtils.java:40) ~[spring-ai-core-1.0.0-20241029.213159-795.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.azure.AzureVectorStore.lambda$doSimilaritySearch$3(AzureVectorStore.java:327) ~[spring-ai-azure-store-1.0.0-20241029.180532-549.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] at ~[spring-ai-azure-store-1.0.0-20241029.180532-549.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] at ~[spring-ai-core-1.0.0-20241029.213159-795.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT] at io.micrometer.observation.Observation.observe(Observation.java:565) ~[micrometer-observation-1.13.4.jar:1.13.4] at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1190) ~[tomcat-embed-core-10.1.30.jar:10.1.30] at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659) ~[tomcat-embed-core-10.1.30.jar:10.1.30] at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:63) ~[tomcat-embed-core-10.1.30.jar:10.1.30] at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ~[na:na] ``` Looking the azure console I noticed that index created by spring-ai does not have the Retrivable flag set on the embedding field, so the vector store query was failing. Turning on the checkbox fixes the issue and the query works.
